title: collinsia floribunda
intro: Collinsia floribunda, also known as blue-eyed Mary, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Collinsia floribunda include soothing sore throats, relieving coughs, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant include making teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
